Common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
Common.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, refresh the page, or report the issue.
Common.criticalErrorDescription: A critical error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

Errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please reconnect your wallet.
Errors.accessDenied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
Errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
Errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
Errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
Errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Errors.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection.
Errors.walletNotDetected: Freighter wallet not detected. Please install Freighter.
Errors.walletRejected: The wallet request was rejected by the user.
Errors.wrongNetwork: Please switch to the correct Stellar network in your wallet.
Errors.transactionTooLarge: Transaction fee exceeds budget. Try with smaller amounts.
Errors.contractError: The smart contract returned an error. Please try again.
Errors.transactionTimeout: The transaction timed out. Please try again.
